rows.notes: Consensus between all extractors for header type, description, and lack of monetary values. Visually confirmed as a clear page title.
Amounts (£3 s16 d8) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. Gemini-flash's description 'Civitat Oxon' is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Circuit Oxon'.

Amounts (£0 s0 d8) are consistent between extractors and visually confirmed. Chosen gpt-5-mini's description 'Coll Adis xti' as 'xti' is a common abbreviation for Christi and matches the visual more closely than gemini-flash's 'Rtt'.

Description chosen as 'Coll Adis xti' consistent with the previous related entry. Visually confirmed amounts to be £0 s18 d0, matching gpt-5-mini's pence value. Gemini-flash incorrectly read pence as '4'.
Visually confirmed description as 'Coll Omn: Anima' and amounts as £4 s12 d4, matching gpt-5-mini. Gemini-flash had incorrect amounts (£0 s0 d0) and a less accurate description ('Coll Orm: Anno').
Description, shillings, and pence values are consistent across extractors. Visually confirmed pounds to be '0', matching gpt-5-mini. Gemini-flash incorrectly read pounds as '4'.
Visually confirmed description as 'Coll S.J.B.' and amounts as £0 s12 d6, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini provided a less accurate description and incorrect amounts.
Visually confirmed description as 'Mayors Capons' (without an apostrophe) and amounts as £0 s8 d2, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts (£0 s14 d0) for this entry.

This row ('Curia Archings' with amounts £0 s14 d0) is clearly present in the image and was extracted by gemini-flash. It was missed by gpt-5-mini, which produced a different, incorrect description and amounts for this position.

Visually confirmed description as 'Procur: Kidley: S:Newington & Merth.' and amounts as £0 s1 d8, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini had the correct amounts but an inaccurate description ('Annia Hastings') for this line item.

Visually confirmed description as 'Easter Synods ditto' (from gemini-flash). Amounts and fraction (£1 s18 d11.5) match for the corresponding line item from both extractors. Both correctly identified the 'ob' as a 0.5 fraction after '11'.
Description 'Coquo' is consistent. Visually confirmed amounts to be £1 s10 d4, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's amounts (£2 s0 d0) were incorrect.
Visually confirmed description as 'Lobicra' and amounts as £2 s0 d0, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini provided a less accurate description ('Lomia') and incorrect amounts.
Visually confirmed description as 'Scull: & Ladroz' (with a stylized 'z') and amounts as £1 s6 d8, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's description ('Scull. & Laundry') and amounts were incorrect.

Visually confirmed description as 'Cleansing Chap. Oct. 5' (gemini-flash's 'Cleansing' over gpt-5-mini's 'Cleaning') and amounts as £0 s2 d0, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly extracted amounts (£23 s0 d0) from a subsequent entry.

Visually confirmed description and amounts (£23 s0 d0) match gemini-flash. Gemini-flash also correctly identified the superscript mark in 'Annun.'. Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts (£28 s0 d0) and a less accurate description.

Visually confirmed description as '— ad fest. Mic' and amounts as £23 s0 d0, matching gemini-flash. The dash indicates a continuation of the previous entry's amount. Gpt-5-mini had incorrect amounts (£0 s13 d4).
Visually confirmed description starts with 'J', matching gemini-flash's 'Jonson'. Amounts £0 s13 d4 also match gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's description ('Insor') and amounts (£4 s0 d0) were incorrect.
Visually confirmed description as 'Reparationibus Cif.' and amounts as £4 s0 d0, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's description ('Supervisor Adj.') and amounts were incorrect.
Description 'Janitor' is consistent. Visually confirmed amounts to be £1 s14 d8, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's amounts (£0 s13 d4) were incorrect.
Description 'Bibliothecario' is consistent. Visually confirmed amounts to be £0 s13 d4, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's amounts (£0 s2 d0) were incorrect.
Visually confirmed description 'Bibl. Lect. Oct. 5' (gemini-flash's 'Bibl.' over gpt-5-mini's 'Bib:') and amounts £0 s2 d0, matching gemini-flash. Gpt-5-mini's amounts (£1 s0 d0) were incorrect.
Consensus between all extractors for this entry's type, description, and monetary values. Visually confirmed.

Visually confirmed description as '— Consecration' and amounts as £1 s0 d0, matching gemini-flash. The dash indicates it's a continuation of the previous entry. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified this as a 'header' with 'Concession' as description and no amounts.

Amounts (£10 s0 d0) are consistent. Gemini-flash's description 'Southenevington Vicar ad fest. Annun.' is visually more accurate for the initial word and the abbreviation 'Annun.' than gpt-5-mini's 'Southwarkington Vicars ad Sept Annual'.

Amounts (£10 s0 d0) are consistent. Gemini-flash's description '— ad fest. Mic' is visually more accurate, including the initial dash indicating a continuation, compared to gpt-5-mini's 'ad Sept. Mice'.
Amounts (£1 s3 d0) are consistent. Visually confirmed description 'Bedel of Beggars', matching gemini-flash, as 'of' is clearly visible rather than '&' from gpt-5-mini.

rows.description: Plate excise due Lady Day Cast
rows.notes: Amounts (£5 s15 d0) are consistent. Combined best parts of descriptions: 'excise' (gpt-5-mini) is the standard spelling and visually accurate, while 'Cast' (gemini-flash) is visually more accurate for the last word than 'Last' (gpt-5-mini).

Visually confirmed total amounts as £100 s2 d11.5, matching gpt-5-mini. The mark after '11' is clearly a half-penny (0.5) symbol, not a '9'. Gemini-flash incorrectly read this as '119', which violates the pence rule (max 11 pence), though it correctly noted the rule violation. Gpt-5-mini's reading adheres to rules and visual evidence.
